name: Services Your Destination
recent_news: Micro non-emergency medical transport van operator (NPI 1801103304 'Your Destination Transportation LLC'); ~3 employees, sub-$250K revenue; not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a fit. NEMT/secured medical van, no school-district contracts; far too small (3 employees) to move the needle for Summit even as a tuck-in.

name: Semax Inc
recent_news: Yelp lists Semax (Clovis, CA) as CLOSED as of May 2026; was non-emergency medical/wheelchair transport founded Nov 2007 by Jeff Bils; never a school-bus operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Defunct/closed micro NEMT operator, not a school-bus contractor. Exclude from Summit pipeline.

name: Angel Wheels Transportation
districts_or_customers: Chicago northwestern suburbs - medical offices, hospitals, dialysis centers
recent_news: Founded 2009; private non-emergency medical transport for wheelchair-dependent passengers in Chicago NW suburbs (HQ Wheaton/Schaumburg area); 7-day/365 service; no school-district contracts indicated.
fit_notes: Not a fit. NEMT/wheelchair (medical) operator, not a school-bus contractor. Outside Summit's student-transport thesis.

name: Hudson Group LTD
districts_or_customers: weddings, corporate events, Chicagoland special events
recent_news: Family-owned 'The Trolley Car & Bus Company' (dba Hudson Group LTD) operating since 1998 out of Bensenville, IL; fleet of vintage trolleys, mini-coaches and motor coaches; markets to weddings/corporate not school districts.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Charter/trolley/wedding operator with no school-bus or SPED business; outside Summit's tuck-in scope.

name: Alpine Limo
recent_news: Micro limo operator out of Marlboro NJ (243 Kensington Dr) tied to Michael Magari; website alpinelimo1.com unreachable; no evidence of school-district contracts or yellow-bus operations. Distinct from the larger Alpine Limousine Service Inc (alpinelimousinenyc.com).
fit_notes: Not a fit. Appears to be a 3-person livery/limo business, not a student-transportation contractor; exclude from Summit pipeline.
